program_name: Англійська та французька мови й зарубіжна література в закладах освіти
decision_basis: possibleSolution=1 (accredit); accreditationDecision=5. EG concluded programme is viable and effectively realised. No substantive deficiencies found; weaknesses are minor (procedure for awarding professional qualifications, syllabi navigation, publication activity).
key_finding: This two-language programme (English primary, French additional) received no balance remarks concerning credit distribution between the two language subjects. The EG explicitly praised 'balanced combination of language, literary-studies, methodological and psychological-pedagogical component blocks', suggesting the dual-language design was accepted as-is without scrutiny of asymmetry.
